name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Constants *)
N == 5

(* Helper functions *)
LEFT(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RIGHT(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* State predicates *)
IsThinking(i) == states[i] = "thinking"
IsHungry(i) == states[i] = "hungry"
IsEating(i) == states[i] = "eating"

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> "free"]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ IsThinking(i)
          /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = "free"
          /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = "free"
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
          /\ forks' = forks
        \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ IsHungry(i)
          /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = "free"
          /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = "free"
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LEFT(i)] = "occupied", ![RIGHT(i)] = "occupied"]
        \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ IsEating(i)
          /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = "occupied"
          /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = "occupied"
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LEFT(i)] = "free", ![RIGHT(i)] = "free"]

(* Invariant: No two adjacent philosophers are eating simultaneously *)
NoAdjacentEating == \A i \in 1..N :
                    /\ IsEating(i)
                    => forks[LEFT(i)] = "free" /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = "free"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = <<>>
        /\ state = "Follower"

Next == \/ /\ state = "Follower"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = "Follower"
        \/ /\ state = "Candidate"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
        /\ votedFor' = <<>>
        /\ state' = "Candidate"
        \/ /\ state = "Leader"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = Append(readers, 1)
        \/ /\ writer_active' = TRUE
          /\ readers' = <<>>
        \/ /\ writer_active' = FALSE
          /\ readers' = Tail(readers)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES token, messages

Init == /\ token \in 1..N
        /\ messages \in 1..N -> 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ messages' \in 1..N -> 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1
           /\ messages' = [i \in 1..N |-> IF i = token THEN token' ELSE messages[i]]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token, messages>>

EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values

VARIABLES store

Init == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
Next == \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
          \/ /\ \E k \in Keys: /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = store[k]]
TypeOK == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES clocks, offsets

Init == /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ offsets = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

Next == /\ \A i \in 1..N : clocks[i] = clocks[i] + offsets[i]
        /\ \A i \in 1..N : offsets[i] = offsets[i] + (RandomDrift(i))
        /\ \A i \in 1..N : clocks[i] = clocks[i] + (SyncAdjustment(i))

RandomDrift(i) == CHOOSE d \in -1..1 : TRUE

SyncAdjustment(i) == (1 \div N) * \Sum j \in 1..N : (clocks[j] - clocks[i])

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks, offsets>>

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Gossip ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES known, infected

Init == /\ known = <<>> /\ infected = <<>> /\ Len(known) = Len(infected)

Next == /\ known' = known
        /\ infected' = Append(infected, known)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<known, infected>>

====

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Pages, Client

VARIABLE free, allocated, p

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Client |-> {}]

Next == /\ \E c \in Client:
          /\ c \notin DOMAIN allocated
          /\ \E p \in free:
              /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = \E p' \in free: p']
              /\ free' = free \ {p}
        \/ \E c \in DOMAIN allocated:
          /\ \E p \in allocated[c]:
              /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = \E p' \in allocated[c]: p']
              /\ free' = free \cup {p}

TypeOK == /\ free \subseteq Pages
          /\ \A c \in Client: allocated[c] \subseteq Pages
          /\ \A c \in Client: allocated[c] \subseteq free
          /\ \A c1, c2 \in Client: c1 # c2 => allocated[c1] \cap allocated[c2] = {}

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>> ==

====

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn \in {0,1}
        /\ wants \in {0,1}^2
        /\ wants = [i \in {0,1} |-> 0]

Next == 
  \/ /\ turn = 0
      /\ wants[0] = 0
      /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![0] = 1]
      /\ turn' = 1
      /\ UNCHANGED <<wants[1]>>
  \/ /\ turn = 1
      /\ wants[1] = 0
      /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![1] = 1]
      /\ turn' = 0
      /\ UNCHANGED <<wants[0]>>
  \/ /\ turn = 0
      /\ wants[0] = 1
      /\ UNCHANGED <<turn, wants>>
  \/ /\ turn = 1
      /\ wants[1] = 1
      /\ UNCHANGED <<turn, wants>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

====

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Node

VARIABLES counts

Init == /\ counts \in [Node -> [Node -> Nat]]
       /\ \A n \in Node: counts[n][n] = 0
       /\ \A n1, n2 \in Node: n1 # n2 => counts[n1][n2] = 0

Next == \E n \in Node:
          /\ counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n][n] = counts[n][n] + 1]
          /\ \A n1, n2 \in Node: n1 # n2 => counts'[n1][n2] = counts[n1][n2]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<counts>>

TypeOK == /\ counts \in [Node -> [Node -> Nat]]
          /\ \A n \in Node: counts[n][n] \in Nat
          /\ \A n1, n2 \in Node: n1 # n2 => counts[n1][n2] \in Nat

====
